message:
🐛 Reset triggerGuardRef and cancelState on success in UpdateSettings (#10861)

triggerGuardRef.current was only reset to false on error, leaving the
update button permanently disabled after a successful trigger.
Similarly, cancelState was set to 'pending' but never reset to 'idle'
on success, disabling the cancel button permanently.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
